source_limit_notes: Aggregate reference profile from Sprint 4 sanitized corpus summaries and local DB-backed dry-run evidence.
No copied public decklist is stored in this profile artifact.
cEDH optimization is not assumed; profile targets high-synergy Abzan tokens/counters/aristocrats gameplay.

themes.name: abzan_tokens_counters_aristocrats
themes.notes: Ghave converts +1/+1 counters into Saprolings and Saprolings back into counters; prioritize engines that support both directions.

themes.name: saproling_fungus_tokens
themes.notes: Maintain visible Saproling/Fungus density so the generated deck does not collapse into generic Abzan goodstuff.

themes.name: sacrifice_aristocrats_finishers
themes.notes: Token sacrifice and death/ETB drains are valid closers when paired with board development.

themes.name: counter_and_token_doublers
themes.notes: Doubling and +1/+1 counter scaling are key engine pieces but should not crowd out ramp, interaction, or lands.

themes.name: cathars_crusade_style_engines
themes.notes: Cathars-style snowballing is an important package, not the only plan.

avoid_patterns.reason: Blue and red cards are outside Ghave color identity and must never be recommended.

examples: generic Abzan midrange cards with no token, counter, sacrifice, or aristocrats role
avoid_patterns.reason: Generated decks must preserve Ghave's tokens/counters/aristocrats identity.

examples: all-in combo shell without casual/high-power guardrails
avoid_patterns.reason: Sprint 4 evidence supports synergistic Commander builds, not an automatic cEDH profile.
